metrics_help.projects: Projects this person leads / is DRI of (first number is lead, second is DRI)
metrics_help.agents: Total agents this person owns; how many are running right now shows in the status above the card
metrics_help.autopilots: Scheduled automations (daily/weekly digests, patrols) this person owns
metrics_help.ai_usage: AI tokens used this week / this month, which is roughly the cost

distribution_help: Tasks assigned to this person plus their agents, by status (an AI-native team's work mostly sits on the agents)
blocked_help: Tasks stuck in the blocked status
